import api from'./api';const salaryService={getMySalaries:params=>api.get('/salary/my',{params}),// Admin
getAll:params=>api.get('/salary',{params}),getByEmployee:(userId,params)=>api.get("/salary/employee/".concat(userId),{params}),generate:(userId,data)=>api.post("/salary/generate/".concat(userId),data),generateAll:data=>api.post('/salary/generate-all',data),markAsPaid:id=>api.patch("/salary/".concat(id,"/paid"))};export default salaryService;
